WitchFactor.name: Witch Factor
WitchFactor.desc:
- Max Stack: 100
- Damage dealt +0.5% for each Stack (max 50%)

Witchization.name: Witchization
Witchization.desc:
- Max Stack: 100
- At turn start, lose (Stack / 2) SP (max 25)
- At turn end, gain 1 Stack, plus 1 Stack for every 10 [WitchFactor]
- SP cannot be higher than 0
- Set base Physical Resistances to 0.5
- At turn start, gain (Stack / 2) [Offense Level Up] (max 5)
- At turn start, gain (Stack / 2) [Haste] (max 3)

Rebuttal.name: Rebuttal
Rebuttal.desc:
- Max Stack: 5
- Nikaidou Hiro's Skills gain additional effects against targets with this effect
- At turn end, lose 1 Stack

Rewind.name: Rewind
Rewind.desc:
- Max Stack: 2
- HP cannot drop below 1
- If fatal damage is taken, heal ([WitchFactor] Stack + 30)% HP (max 80%) at the next turn start, recover from Stagger, clear all negative effects, and lose 1 Stack

RewindWitch.name: Rewind - Witchization
RewindWitch.desc:
- Max Stack: 2
- HP cannot drop below 1
- If fatal damage is taken, heal to full HP at the next turn start, recover from Stagger, clear all negative effects, gain 1 [Attack Power Up], and lose 1 Stack

RitualSword.name: Ritual Sword
RitualSword.desc:
- Damage dealt to Abnormalities and enemies with less than 0 SP +10%
- damage dealt to Witch units +50%
- When inflicting [Laceration] Potency or Count, inflict +1 more
- On hit with the last Coin of a base Skill, additionally inflict 1 [Laceration] Count, and trigger [Laceration] once more on the target

Repose.name: Repose
Repose.desc:
- Max Stack: 13
- Damage taken +2% for each Stack
- If this unit has [Witchization], Damage taken -2% for each Stack instead
- Damage taken from E.G.O Corrosion Skills -80%

ReposeMark.name: Repose Mark
ReposeMark.desc: - Internal marker for the Repose Ritual's additional damage (no effect on its own)
